query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: The plan for cheaper petrol and diesel this summer: curbing fuel price hikes with a discount at the pump
articles.description: Athens is preparing a temporary discount on petrol and diesel as renewed U.S.-Iran tensions push Brent above $76 a barrel, with Greece's two refineries funding the scheme, expected to run until the end of August

articles.title: Could oil prices spike further? Inside the fragile US-Iran stance in the Gulf
articles.description: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East have escalated after attacks on commercial vessels. Iran's objective appears to be expanding its strategic influence over the Strait of Hormuz. Gulf nations are remaining cautious to avoid direct involvement in the confrontation. Crude oil prices are expected to remain elevated due to ongoing geopolitical risks. India, a major oil importer, faces increased vulnerability from these market developments.

articles.title: The highs and lows and highs of fuel prices
articles.description: Oil prices are not cheap in the summer and expensive in winter. The price is driven by the global economy and speculation on the futures market, not the weather.

articles.title: Trump says US, Iran agree to continue talks but ceasefire over
articles.description: Trump announces US-Iran talks will continue despite ending ceasefire, while escalating tensions over threats and oil prices.

articles.title: OGRA raises Kerosene price by Rs11.19 in latest fuel price review
articles.description: OGRA has increased the kerosene price by Rs11.19 per litre, while petrol and diesel prices have also risen.

articles.title: Trump says US, Iran agree to continue talks but ceasefire over
articles.description: By Steve Holland and Enas AlashrayWASHINGTON/CAIRO, July 11 (Reuters) - President Donald Trump said the U.S. and Iran had agreed to continue talks despite an escalation of hostilities this week but he declared that the ceasefire reached between the two sides last month was over.The United States also stepped up demands on Friday that Iran stop attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz, where recent hostilities have pushed oil prices higher, a politically sensitive issue for Trump ahead of November congressional elections.

articles.title: Govt raises petrol, diesel prices by over Rs13 per litre
articles.description: ISLAMABAD  -  The federal government late Friday jacked up the prices of petrol Rs 13.18 per litre and high-speed diesel by Rs 13.80 per litre.

articles.title: 5 world market themes for the week ahead
articles.description: TSMC's earnings will offer insights into AI chip demand this week. Wall Street banks are set to report, with expectations for strong corporate profits. Oil prices remain volatile amid tensions with Iran and Strait of Hormuz flows. US inflation data will gauge the Federal Reserve's stance on interest rates. Chinese economic figures will reveal the impact of global events on its growth.

articles.title: Wall Street Week Ahead: Investors to grapple with packed week of earnings, CPI, Iran headlines
articles.description: Upcoming economic data and corporate earnings will test the resilient U.S. stock market. Major banks begin second-quarter earnings season, which is expected to be strong. Key economic reports, including the consumer price index, are due next week. Oil prices jumped amid concerns over renewed attacks on shipping and global supplies. Investors seek rate-path signs from inflation data and geopolitical developments.

articles.title: German luxury carmakers split on hybrids as EV sales surge
articles.description: BMW dismisses hybrids as costly and unnecessary, while Mercedes is betting on them to ease the shift away from petrol and diesel.
